verdicts.note: Management explicitly guided to roughly 20% revenue growth in FY27.
Transcript states a ~25% EBITDA margin target for FY27.
FY27 capex of Rs 650-700 crore for cGMP-4 confirmed on the call.
No mention of any dividend, let alone Rs 50/share, anywhere in the transcript.
cGMP capacity stated up ~40% YoY and 18% QoQ on the Dahej cGMP-4 block.
Transcript notes CDMO leadership but gives no explicit 35% figure.
No explicit HPP revenue share stated on the call.
No explicit specialty-chemicals share stated on the call.
CDMO margins implied to be high but 30% not stated verbatim.

verdicts.claim: Segment EBITDA margin: High Performance Products = not disclosed
verdicts.note: HPP margin not disclosed, consistent with the transcript's silence on it.
